details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Airline Approved, Breathable, Built-In Door, Foldable, Lightweight

about_item: Airline approved pet carrier: 19"L x 12"W x 12"H, the carrier is recommended for pets who weigh up to 20 lbs (9 kg).. Before purchasing please measure your pet - LENGTH: neck to base of tail; HEIGHT: floor to top of shoulder.
Safety belt straps: Allows it to be restrained with a vehicle seat belt for car travel, and this belt strap is easy to attach to your luggage for convenience.
Soft-sided carrier designed to make traveling with your furry friend easier, the mesh netting on the front and top for ventilation and to let light in.
Made of waterproof and durable material with a removable pad for your paw-tner to rest on.Anti-scratch.All zippers are anti-escape.Carrying handles and adjustable padded shoulder strap for comfort.
With a back pocket for accessory storage space to hold treats,toy,leashes, collars or other travel gear. Folds down into a small flat package for easy storage.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be the best they've used, appreciating its good size for travel and the ability to unzip all sides for easy access. The carrier is sturdy, comfortable, and easy to use, with one customer noting the shoulder strap provides extra comfort. They like its appearance and consider it good value for money.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find this pet carrier to be of good quality, with one customer noting it performs better than hard carriers.

examples.snippet: This is a very well made carrier. Am very happy with the quality at a great price.
Great carrier
Love this cat carrier, sturdy, stylish and perfect size.
This is a very nice carrier. it is nice looking, sturdy, many options and just a good deal and good price!

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's size, describing it as good and extra roomy, making it perfect for travel with pets. One customer mentions that their pet can be rolled right into the carrier.

examples.snippet: Perfect size and lightweight. It is very sturdy and easy to carry.
I love it, cute and roomy.
i have a small pug/min pin mix and he has plenty of room. Plenty of zippers allows for easy cleaning and handling
...Nice size so I can carry one in each hand. The top and the ends all unzip for good access....

examples.snippet: This is a very nice carrier. it is nice looking, sturdy, many options and just a good deal and good price!

I have a 12 pound YorkiePoo and she fit in it perfectly. She could stand up, although she slept most of the flight....
Sturdy bottom piece, lots of netting to allow good air flow. My cats weigh 9 and 11 pounds, so we got 2 matching carriers!...

insights.summary: Customers find the appearance of the pet carrier pretty.

examples.snippet: The construction seems sturdy. It's cute and didn't have a horrible plastic smell. I used it to take a fat cat to the vet and it worked perfectly.
Beautiful carrier, my cat uses as a bed Sturdy & easy to put together Great price
Love this cat carrier, sturdy, stylish and perfect size.
Very cute, top and size openings and foldable. But the bottom feels very unstable when pet is inside, very thin removable piece .

i have a small pug/min pin mix and he has plenty of room. Plenty of zippers allows for easy cleaning and handling
...Carrier collapses. First thing I disliked about this carrier is that it doesn’t stand open, it collapses....

authors_reviews.title: nice size and quality
authors_reviews.text: These are great little carriers for short trips. A little cramped for full grown kitties but great for a quick trip to the vet. Nice size so I can carry one in each hand. The top and the ends all unzip for good access. Kittties seem comfortable and usually settle and lay down and look out through the mesh screen windows. Good quality, we've had these for 5 years and no problems. If kitty has an accident, they clean up easy, I have hosed them out and then let them dry. I usually put them in the back seat and run the seatbelt through the handle to keep the furbabies safe.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Excellent quality
authors_reviews.text: This is so cute I got this pattern because my other cat has the same one except with the blue flowers. It’s very good quality and holds up to 22 pounds which will be good for my ragdoll girls.
authors_reviews.author: Debrc

authors_reviews.title: Best Carrier Ever
authors_reviews.text: No more stuffing my unwilling kitty into the small end door of a hardsided carrier. Just unzip the side mesh panel and pretty much roll kitty right into carrier. No fuss no muss!!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Cute and functional
authors_reviews.text: I love the design of this bag. I've gotten several compliments on how cute it is. It unzips on both ends. The top also unzips to open. The bottom has a covering that can come off and be washed. The quality is not as good as I would like though. I would say it's probably better for kittens to small cats.
authors_reviews.author: Leah

authors_reviews.title: Ease of getting cat into carrier
authors_reviews.text: Way better than those hard she'll carrier's and a lot easier to get my fur babies in them.
authors_reviews.author: Liz L

authors_reviews.title: Best carrier!
authors_reviews.text: Love these carriers! Very strong even for my heavier set cats. My youngest cat loves the carrier! I have to leave it out and open cause she loves to sleep on the comfy cushion! She loves even playing in it. Easy to carry your cats. Either on your shoulder or just in your hands.
authors_reviews.author: Isabella

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful purple carrier
authors_reviews.text: Beautiful carrier, my cat uses as a bedSturdy & easy to put togetherGreat price
authors_reviews.author: Christina Tracy

authors_reviews.title: Perfect!!
authors_reviews.text: This cat carrier is so much nicer than the hard side carrier we used before. It is softer for our senior cat. It has a top zipper that makes it easier to put our cat in and take her out of it. That top zipper also allows easier petting access while she needs to be in her there. I would definitely recommend this carrier!!
authors_reviews.author: Keri

other_countries_reviews.title: Excelente !
other_countries_reviews.text: Excelente ! Pero la tuve que regresar porque estaba muy grande pero la calidad era hermosa !
other_countries_reviews.author: Genesis Rojas
